judgment.summary: Rapidly growing company with high future expectations, but currently unprofitable and trading at a high valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter missed EPS estimate; next earnings date 2026-08-06.
positives: Revenue growth 51.4% YoY — strong top-line expansion.
Analyst growth est, current FY 441.7% — significant future growth projected.
Forward P/E 36.38x and PEG ratio 0.78x — growth is priced in but potentially reasonable.
Total cash $439.70M vs total debt $280.42M — manageable leverage.
Current ratio 3.83 and Quick ratio 2.85 — strong short-term liquidity.
negatives: Operating margin -8.6% and Profit margin -8.5% — currently loss-making.
Return on equity -6.1% and Return on assets -3.3% — negative returns on capital.
Free cash flow (TTM) $-445.58M — burning cash significantly.
Price/Sales (TTM) 27.47x — very high valuation relative to current sales.
Last quarter missed EPS estimate by 44.8%.

news.paragraph: AAOI is experiencing a sell-off alongside other AI leaders, despite Mark Cuban's recent commentary highlighting the importance of foundational AI. The broader market sentiment appears to be shifting, with headlines noting a general pullback in tech names. Investors should monitor upcoming earnings for signs of continued demand or a broader slowdown in the AI sector.

headlines.title: Dow Jones Futures: Trump Iran Delay Saves Dow, But Sandisk, Bloom Energy, AI Leaders Sell Off
Applied Optoelectronics Inc. (AAOI): Mark Cuban Urges Focus on Foundational AI
Ambiq Micro (AMBQ) Reports Q1 2026 GAAP Net Sales of $25.1M
